title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

Announcements

2025 - 2026 Academic Year Fall Semester Revised Final Exam Schedule

12
						January

2026

Dear Students,

The final exam schedule has been updated due to the snow holiday.

Accordingly,

the exam date, time, and classroom information for some courses have changed

.

In the revised exam schedule, the

courses for which the exam dates have been changed are marked in green

. In addition,

courses for which only the classroom information has been updated, while the exam day remains the same, are indicated in yellow and blue

. To ensure the schedule is interpreted correctly, it is important to take these color codes into consideration.

To avoid any inconvenience, you are kindly requested to check the entire final exam schedule carefully. Please note that the changes are not limited to a single exam and may also affect exams scheduled on different days.

For the most up-to-date and valid information, please refer only to the revised final exam schedule that has been officially announced today.

We wish you success in your examinations.

Click for the Final Exam Schedule.
